phase_statuses.title: Extract shared user mutation rule parsing
phase_statuses.objective: Move repeated create/update normalization and validation logic into bounded helpers while keeping `UserManagementManager` as the stable facade.

acceptance_criteria.text: `UserManagementManager` no longer directly owns duplicated create/update parsing for company/department relation checks, manager/sub-admin assignment, permission-group resolution, and managed-root handling in one file.
existing business errors and role-specific behavior remain stable for duplicate usernames, manager validation, admin disable guards, and disable scheduling.
invalid user mutations still fail fast with the existing business errors instead of introducing fallback paths.

phase_statuses.notes: - - Extracted shared user mutation parsing into manager_support.py and kept UserManagementManager as the public facade while preserving fail-fast errors.

phase_statuses.title: Focused backend regression validation and task evidence
phase_statuses.objective: Prove the bounded users-manager refactor preserved the current business behavior.

acceptance_criteria.text: focused users-manager tests pass against the final code state.
task artifacts record the exact commands run, verified acceptance coverage, and bounded residual risk.

phase_statuses.notes: - - Focused py_compile and pytest evidence recorded in task artifacts with acceptance coverage and bounded residual risk.

goal: 继续进行前后端重构直到重构结束：本 tranche 聚焦 backend/services/users/manager.py，抽离 create/update 共用的用户组织、角色、权限组与禁用策略解析逻辑，保持用户管理对外行为和现有单测契约稳定
